name: Inclusion Body Solubilization and Protein Refolding
nameCn: 包涵体溶解与蛋白复性

components.name: 1. Isolate inclusion bodies: lyse cells, wash pellet 3× with wash buffer

note.en: Lyse in lysis_buffer_mild + 1% Triton X-100. Sonicate 3× 30 s on ice. Centrifuge 15,000×g 15 min 4°C. Keep pellet. Wash pellet 3× with wash buffer (50 mM Tris pH 8.0, 100 mM NaCl, 1 mM EDTA, 0.5% Triton X-100) then 1× without Triton. Pellet = purified inclusion bodies.
note.zh: lysis_buffer_mild + 1% Triton X-100 裂解。冰上超声 3× 30 s。15,000×g 15 min 4°C。保留沉淀。洗涤缓冲液（50 mM Tris pH 8.0、100 mM NaCl、1 mM EDTA、0.5% Triton X-100）洗 3 次，再无 Triton 洗 1 次。沉淀 = 纯化的包涵体。

components.name: 2. Solubilize: resuspend inclusion body pellet in denaturing buffer

note.en: Denaturing buffer: 6 M GuHCl (or 8 M urea), 50 mM Tris pH 8.0, 100 mM NaCl, 10 mM β-ME (or 5 mM DTT). Resuspend at 5–20 mg/mL. Stir/rotate at RT 1–2 h until completely dissolved (solution clears).
note.zh: 变性缓冲液：6 M 盐酸胍（或 8 M 尿素）、50 mM Tris pH 8.0、100 mM NaCl、10 mM β-ME（或 5 mM DTT）。5–20 mg/mL 重悬。RT 搅拌 1–2 h 至完全溶解（溶液变透明）。

note.en: Remove insoluble debris. Supernatant = denatured soluble protein. Check purity by SDS-PAGE.
note.zh: 去除不溶性碎片。上清 = 变性可溶蛋白。SDS-PAGE 检测纯度。

components.name: 4. Optional: Ni-NTA purification under denaturing conditions

note.en: Bind buffer: 6 M GuHCl, 50 mM NaH₂PO₄ pH 8.0, 300 mM NaCl, 10 mM imidazole. Wash: same + 20 mM imidazole. Elute: same + 250 mM imidazole. Pool eluted fractions.
note.zh: 结合缓冲液：6 M GuHCl、50 mM NaH₂PO₄ pH 8.0、300 mM NaCl、10 mM imidazole。洗涤：同上 + 20 mM imidazole。洗脱：同上 + 250 mM imidazole。合并洗脱组分。

note.en: Dilute protein dropwise into 50–100× volume ice-cold refolding buffer (50 mM Tris pH 8.0, 150 mM NaCl, 0.5 mM oxidized glutathione, 5 mM reduced glutathione, 10% glycerol) with constant stirring. Final protein: 0.01–0.1 mg/mL. Stir 4°C, 12–24 h.
note.zh: 蛋白逐滴加入 50–100 倍体积的冰冷复性缓冲液（50 mM Tris pH 8.0、150 mM NaCl、0.5 mM 氧化型谷胱甘肽、5 mM 还原型谷胱甘肽、10% 甘油），持续搅拌。终浓度 0.01–0.1 mg/mL。4°C 搅拌 12–24 h。

components.name: 6. Refolding Method B: Stepwise dialysis (higher yield)

note.en: Dialyze denatured protein against decreasing denaturant: 4 M → 2 M → 1 M → 0.5 M → 0 M urea in refolding buffer. Each step: 4°C, ≥4 h (or overnight). Slow removal of denaturant allows gradual refolding. protein_dialysis tubing or Slide-A-Lyzer.
note.zh: 变性蛋白对梯度去变性剂透析：4 M → 2 M → 1 M → 0.5 M → 0 M 尿素复性缓冲液。每步：4°C，≥4 h（或过夜）。缓慢去除变性剂促进逐步复性。protein_dialysis 透析袋或 Slide-A-Lyzer。

components.name: 7. Remove aggregates: centrifuge 20,000×g 30 min 4°C; filter 0.22 µm

note.en: Aggregated/misfolded protein pellets. Supernatant = soluble refolded protein. SEC (sec_purification) can separate properly folded monomers from misfolded aggregates.
note.zh: 聚集/错误折叠蛋白在沉淀中。上清 = 可溶复性蛋白。SEC（sec_purification）可分离正确折叠单体和错误折叠聚集体。

components.name: 8. Concentrate and verify activity: Amicon Ultra, then functional assay

note.en: protein_concentration_amicon. Verify folding: SEC (single peak), CD spectroscopy, thermal shift assay (DSF), enzyme activity assay. Typical refolding yield: 5–30% of total denatured protein.
note.zh: protein_concentration_amicon 浓缩。验证折叠：SEC（单峰）、CD 光谱、热迁移分析（DSF）、酶活力测定。典型复性产率：变性蛋白总量的 5–30%。

detailedSteps.zh: **第一天 — 包涵体分离与溶解**

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend bacterial pellet (from 500 mL–1 L culture) in 20 mL lysis buffer (50 mM Tris pH 8.0, 100 mM NaCl, 1 mM EDTA, 1% Triton X-100, 1 mM PMSF, lysozyme 0.2 mg/mL). Incubate on ice 30 min.
detailedSteps.zh: 将细菌沉淀（来自 500 mL–1 L 培养物）重悬于 20 mL 裂解缓冲液（50 mM Tris pH 8.0、100 mM NaCl、1 mM EDTA、1% Triton X-100、1 mM PMSF、溶菌酶 0.2 mg/mL）。冰上孵育 30 min。

detailedSteps.en: Sonicate on ice: 3 cycles × 30 s ON / 30 s OFF at 40% amplitude. Keep sample cold throughout.
detailedSteps.zh: 冰上超声：3 个循环 × 30 s 开 / 30 s 关，40% 振幅。全程保持低温。

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge lysate at 15,000×g for 15 min at 4°C. Discard supernatant. Keep pellet (inclusion bodies).
detailedSteps.zh: 15,000×g 离心 15 min，4°C。弃上清，保留沉淀（包涵体）。

detailedSteps.en: Wash pellet 3× with wash buffer (50 mM Tris pH 8.0, 100 mM NaCl, 1 mM EDTA, 0.5% Triton X-100): resuspend by vortex, centrifuge 15,000×g 10 min 4°C each. Final wash without Triton.
detailedSteps.zh: 洗涤缓冲液洗沉淀 3 次（50 mM Tris pH 8.0、100 mM NaCl、1 mM EDTA、0.5% Triton X-100）：涡旋重悬，15,000×g 离心 10 min 4°C。最后一次洗不加 Triton。

detailedSteps.en: Solubilize IB pellet in denaturing buffer (6 M GuHCl or 8 M urea, 50 mM Tris pH 8.0, 100 mM NaCl, 10 mM β-ME) at 5–20 mg/mL. Stir/rotate at RT for 1–2 h until solution clears.
detailedSteps.zh: 将包涵体沉淀溶于变性缓冲液（6 M 盐酸胍或 8 M 尿素、50 mM Tris pH 8.0、100 mM NaCl、10 mM β-ME），浓度 5–20 mg/mL。室温搅拌 1–2 h 至溶液变透明。

detailedSteps.en: Clarify by centrifugation at 20,000×g for 30 min at 4°C. Collect supernatant (solubilized denatured protein). Check purity by SDS-PAGE.
detailedSteps.zh: 20,000×g 离心 30 min，4°C 澄清。收集上清（溶解的变性蛋白）。SDS-PAGE 检查纯度。

detailedSteps.en: **(Optional)** Purify under denaturing conditions by Ni-NTA: bind in 6 M GuHCl + 10 mM imidazole → wash 20 mM imidazole → elute 250 mM imidazole. Pool eluted fractions.
detailedSteps.zh: **（可选）**变性条件下 Ni-NTA 纯化：6 M GuHCl + 10 mM imidazole 结合→ 20 mM imidazole 洗涤→ 250 mM imidazole 洗脱。合并洗脱组分。

detailedSteps.en: **Method A (Rapid dilution):** Dilute denatured protein dropwise into 50–100× volume ice-cold refolding buffer (50 mM Tris pH 8.0, 150 mM NaCl, 0.5 mM GSSG, 5 mM GSH, 10% glycerol) with constant stirring. Final protein ≤0.1 mg/mL. Stir at 4°C for 12–24 h.
detailedSteps.zh: **方法 A（快速稀释）：**将变性蛋白逐滴加入 50–100 倍体积冰冷复性缓冲液（50 mM Tris pH 8.0、150 mM NaCl、0.5 mM GSSG、5 mM GSH、10% 甘油），持续搅拌。终蛋白浓度 ≤0.1 mg/mL。4°C 搅拌 12–24 h。

detailedSteps.en: **Method B (Stepwise dialysis):** Dialyze against decreasing urea: 4 M → 2 M → 1 M → 0.5 M → 0 M in refolding buffer. Each step ≥4 h or overnight at 4°C.
detailedSteps.zh: **方法 B（逐步透析）：**对梯度尿素透析：4 M → 2 M → 1 M → 0.5 M → 0 M 复性缓冲液。每步 ≥4 h 或过夜，4°C。
**第二至三天 — 去除聚集体与质检**

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge refolded protein at 20,000×g for 30 min at 4°C. Collect supernatant. Filter through 0.22 µm membrane.
detailedSteps.zh: 复性蛋白 20,000×g 离心 30 min，4°C。收集上清，0.22 µm 过滤。

detailedSteps.en: Concentrate using Amicon Ultra centrifugal filter (appropriate MWCO). Quantify by BCA or Bradford assay.
detailedSteps.zh: Amicon Ultra 超滤管（合适 MWCO）浓缩。BCA 或 Bradford 定量。

detailedSteps.en: Verify folding by SEC (single monomer peak), CD spectroscopy, thermal shift assay (DSF), or functional/enzyme activity assay. Typical refolding yield: 5–30%.
detailedSteps.zh: 验证折叠：SEC（单体单峰）、CD 光谱、热迁移分析（DSF）或功能/酶活力测定。典型复性产率：5–30%。

briefSteps.en: Lyse bacteria → Wash IB pellet 3× → Solubilize in 6M GuHCl/8M urea → Clarify 20,000×g → (Optional Ni-NTA) → Refold by rapid dilution or stepwise dialysis → Remove aggregates → Concentrate → Verify folding by SEC/activity assay
briefSteps.zh: 裂解细菌 → 洗涤包涵体 3× → 6M GuHCl/8M 尿素溶解 → 20,000×g 澄清 → （可选 Ni-NTA）→ 快速稀释或逐步透析复性 → 去除聚集体 → 浓缩 → SEC/活性验证折叠

note.en: Solubilized inclusion bodies in denaturing buffer can be stored at −80°C for up to 1 month
note.zh: 变性缓冲液中的包涵体溶解液可 −80°C 保存最长 1 个月

note.en: Denatured protein purified by Ni-NTA can be stored at −80°C in elution buffer
note.zh: Ni-NTA 纯化的变性蛋白可在洗脱缓冲液中 −80°C 保存

note.en: Refolded, concentrated protein can be stored at 4°C short-term (days) or flash-frozen at −80°C with 10% glycerol for months
note.zh: 复性浓缩蛋白可 4°C 短期保存（数天）或加 10% 甘油液氮速冻后 −80°C 保存数月

notes.en: Key factors affecting refolding: (1) Protein concentration during refolding (lower = better, ≤0.1 mg/mL); (2) Redox pair (GSH:GSSG 5:0.5 mM for disulfide-containing proteins); (3) Temperature (4°C preferred); (4) Additives: L-arginine (0.4–0.8 M) dramatically reduces aggregation (Tsumoto et al. 2004). Screen conditions with small-scale (1 mL) refolding trials before scale-up.
notes.zh: 影响复性的关键因素：(1) 复性时蛋白浓度（越低越好，≤0.1 mg/mL）；(2) 氧化还原对（含二硫键蛋白用 GSH:GSSG 5:0.5 mM）；(3) 温度（首选 4°C）；(4) 添加剂：L-精氨酸（0.4–0.8 M）显著减少聚集（Tsumoto et al. 2004）。大规模复性前先做小规模（1 mL）条件筛选。

ref: Singh & Bhatt (2015) Microb Cell Fact 14:41; Tsumoto et al. (2004) Biotechnol Prog 20:1301; Clark (2001) Curr Opin Biotechnol 12:202–207

materials.name: Solubilization buffer (6 M GuHCl or 8 M urea, 50 mM Tris pH 8.0)
Refolding buffer (50 mM Tris pH 8.0, GSH/GSSG, 10% glycerol)

usage.en: Solubilize and refold proteins from bacterial inclusion bodies using denaturant dilution or dialysis.
usage.zh: 变性剂稀释或透析法溶解和复性细菌包涵体蛋白。
